# Branch Governance Plan

This planning document is not a repository setting and is not an executable workflow.

## Future Branch Governance Concepts

- Protect primary branches before communication infrastructure runtime work exists.
- Require human review for communication infrastructure changes.
- Require documentation review when governance or safety expectations change.
- Require scoped safety scan review once non-deployment CI is approved.
- Preserve runtime-disabled status in every planning branch.

## Non-Execution Statement

This file does not configure branch protection, create automation, deploy code, or enable runtime communication.
